summary: Comprehensive security audit testing of Al-Haram OS crowd management app. 19/22 backend tests passed. WebSocket auth works internally but is intercepted by dev proxy. All security fixes verified working.

minor.issue: In development/preview environment, nginx/proxy intercepts WebSocket connections before backend auth can reject them. Backend auth code is correct when accessed directly (returns code 4001)
minor.note: This is a dev environment artifact - React HMR WebSocket on same path. Production should work correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart container size (-1 width/height) - likely responsive layout timing issue

action_items: Consider separating WebSocket endpoint path from React dev server HMR to avoid proxy conflict in preview environments
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket endpoint in server.py now correctly accepts before closing for auth rejection - good fix pattern
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed WebSocket auth flow to accept before close

success_rate.backend: 86% (19/22 tests passed - 2 WebSocket tests fail due to proxy, 1 fixture error)

websocket_auth.description: WebSocket endpoint requires token query parameter, closes with code 4001 if missing/invalid
websocket_auth.verification: Direct test to ws://127.0.0.1:8001/ws shows correct rejection behavior

database_indexes.description: _ensure_indexes() creates indexes for users, employees, tasks, alerts, map_sessions, gate_sessions, permission_groups, sidebar_menu

permission_groups_is_system.description: 8 default permission groups all have is_system=True and cannot be deleted
permission_groups_is_system.api_test: DELETE /api/admin/permission-groups/{system_group_id} returns 403 with 'لا يمكن حذف مجموعة النظام'

rate_limiting.description: Login (10/min), change-pin (5/min), reset-pin (10/min), change-password (5/min) all have @limiter.limit decorators

copyright_year_dynamic.description: Login page shows '© 2026' using new Date().getFullYear()

error_boundary.description: ErrorBoundary component wraps entire app in App.js

activity_log_no_english_roles.description: Login activity logs do not contain English role names like (system_admin)

ws_manager_broadcast_dict.description: ws_manager.broadcast() accepts both dict and string parameters

tasks_now_iso_dead_code_removed.description: now_iso() function in tasks.py is clean - just returns datetime ISO string

canViewDepartment_fixed.description: canViewDepartment() properly checks permissions instead of always returning true

admin_login.description: admin@crowd.sa / admin123 login works correctly, returns access_token and user data

dashboard_loads.description: Dashboard loads with KPIs, charts, department cards

sidebar_menu.description: Sidebar menu loads correctly with all department and admin links

permission_groups_crud.description: Can create custom groups (is_system=false), edit them, and delete them. System groups protected.

seed_data_creation: Test permission groups created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit tests complete. All 16 features verified working. WebSocket auth code is correct but dev proxy intercepts. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_security_audit.py covers auth, permissions, rate limiting, activity logs. UI tested via Playwright showing login, dashboard, admin, and permission groups.

rca_of_websocket_test_failure.observation: WebSocket tests pass when connecting directly to backend (ws://127.0.0.1:8001/ws) but fail through public URL (wss://prayer-hall-fix.preview.emergentagent.com/ws)
rca_of_websocket_test_failure.root_cause: React dev server's Hot Module Replacement (HMR) WebSocket runs on the same path and nginx/ingress proxy routes the connection there first, sending {"type":"hot"} messages before backend can reject
rca_of_websocket_test_failure.evidence: Direct connection test shows code 4001 rejection, public URL shows {"type":"hot"} acceptance
rca_of_websocket_test_failure.production_impact: None expected - production builds don't have HMR WebSocket
rca_of_websocket_test_failure.fix_applied: Added accept() before close() in server.py to properly reject via WebSocket protocol
